cases.prompt: 세션 종료할게, 다음 세션 hand-off 준비해줘

assertions.text: Produces a sprint state snapshot at .simonk/session-<timestamp>.md.
Includes recent commits from both repos via git log --oneline -10 (SimonK-stack and SimonKWiki).
Generates a re-entry prompt template for the next session's first message.

cases.prompt: Do a context export for hand-off before I run out of context.

assertions.text: Lists pending tasks split into user-only items and autonomous-next-session items.
Never exports API keys or credentials, only session UUID and recent work paths.
